title: We need board custom view permissions setting "mission critical"

posts.author: dwadsworth (Dustin Wadsworth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We need to be able to configure custom board views, then assign users who can view individual board views. The dynamic filter is ok, but different departments and users have different functions.

I don’t want to buy a custom app to connect data across boards when I can just configure custom board views and control who can see what…

PLEASE MAKE THIS A PRIORITY.

What are you trying to achieve

I want more control over the user experience.

posts.author: AmyM (Amy Morrow)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! I have several partners at our firm that are asking for this as well.
